name: Staked USN
redeem: sUSN can be unstaked in the Noon dApp for USN, subject to a cooldown period whose duration was not specified in the docs, or sold on DEX liquidity. USN primary redemption is permissioned to whitelisted institutional wallets after AML/KYC/KYB review; other users rely on DEX markets.
notes: ERC-4626-style staking token backed by USN in the staking pool. USN is described as backed 1:1 by USDT, USDC, or short-term U.S. Treasury Bills held in custodial wallets; sUSN yield comes from Noon's strategy returns. Main caveats are permissioned primary redemption, offchain/custodial backing, upgradeable token contracts, and unspecified unstake cooldown.
